from __future__ import annotations


def emit(metric: str, value: int) -> tuple[str, int]:
    return metric, value


def metric_emission_occurs_per_item_inside_inner_loop_positive(batches: list[list[int]]) -> list[tuple[str, int]]:
    out: list[tuple[str, int]] = []
    for batch in batches:
        for _item in batch:
            out.append(emit("item.processed", 1))
    return out
